meta.title: fonea – Your Swiss AI Phone Assistant | 24/7, 4 Languages
meta.description: fonea answers your calls around the clock – in German, Swiss German, French, Italian and English. Made in Switzerland.

hero.subtitle: fonea answers your business calls around the clock — in German, Swiss German, French, Italian and English. Book appointments, qualify inquiries, forward important calls.
hero.callerText: Hi, I’d like to book my car in for a service please.
hero.aiText: Sure thing. What kind of car is it and when would work best for you?

pain.title: Every missed call costs you money
pain.subtitle: Waiting is the number one reason customers leave. fonea makes sure no call goes unanswered.
pain.item1desc: Every call is answered instantly. Your customers never have to sit in a queue again.
pain.item2desc: Qualify inquiries immediately and book appointments on the spot while the customer is still on the phone.
pain.item3desc: Free your staff from routine calls so they can focus on complex tasks and in-person customers.

steps.title: Live in 3 simple steps
steps.subtitle: No IT skills required. Your assistant is ready in less than 10 minutes.
steps.step1desc: Sign up in 2 minutes and choose your desired phone number or use your existing one.
steps.step2desc: Give fonea information about your services, opening hours and scheduling tools. fonea learns instantly.
steps.step3desc: Forward your calls to fonea. From now on, AI handles every call professionally and friendly.

industries.title: Industry-specific solutions
industries.medicalDesc: Automatic appointment booking, prescription orders and pre-triage of emergencies according to your specifications.
industries.legalDesc: Precise case intake and forwarding of urgent client calls to the right partner.
industries.tradesDesc: Emergency hotline for on-call services and simple quote requests directly over the phone.
industries.realestateDesc: Prospect qualification for viewings and efficient management of tenant inquiries.

security.item1desc: fonea was built in Switzerland — for Swiss SMBs who value quality and reliability.
security.item2desc: State-of-the-art language models deliver natural conversations — your customers barely notice the difference.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden costs. Full control over your budget. Scales with your success.
pricing.feature2: DE, FR, IT, EN + Swiss German

footer.tagline:
Made in Switzerland.
Modern AI for
Swiss businesses.
